data.explanation: “Above” shows relation between cloud and aeroplane

data.explanation: A clause can function as the object of a preposition; here the clause follows “to.”
options: what I am going to say

data.statement: He is indebted to his parents and teachers.

hard.question: Pick the preposition and its compound object.

data.explanation: “Barring” (meaning “excepting”) is a present participle used as a preposition.

data.explanation: “Pending” functions as a preposition meaning “until.”
data.statement: Pending further instructions, the officers remained alert.
